word: H7059 - קָמַט - qâmaṭ - kaw-mat' - Cut down

sections.paragraph:
Original: קמט

Transliteration: qâmaṭ

Phonetic: kaw-mat'

BDB Definition:

  1. to seize
    1. (Qal) to seize
    2. (Pual) to be snatched away prematurely

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2034

Part(s) of speech: Verb
